title: trisetum trinii var. litorale
intro: Trisetum trinii var. litorale, also known as sea fountain grass or coastal trisetum, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to the coastal regions of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Trisetum trinii var. litorale include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and skin irritations. Trisetum trinii var. litorale can be prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water or as a tincture by extracting the plant's active compounds in a solvent, both of which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
